name: Credit At Last | Best Credit Repair
description_short: Credit At Last offers credit repair services focused on disputing inaccurate items on credit reports. Based in North Miami Beach, Florida, they serve South Florida and claim to operate nationwide.
description_long:
Credit At Last is a credit repair company headquartered in North Miami Beach, Florida, claiming over 20 years of experience in the industry. The company positions itself as a full-service credit solution provider that addresses errors and negative items on credit reports through a systematic dispute process. Their mission emphasizes giving consumers a second chance and helping them restore their financial reputation.

The company offers a range of services beyond basic credit repair, including credit counseling, financial coaching, a score booster service, notary services, business funding assistance, and DIY credit repair resources. Their primary service—credit repair—follows a four-step methodology: identifying errors in credit reports, gathering supporting documentation, preparing dispute letters, and engaging directly with creditors and credit bureaus. They also provide access to credit reports and maintain a blog with financial content.

Credit At Last distinguishes itself through several claims: transparent pricing with "no hidden fees," bilingual services ("Hablamos Español"), and a stated 99.9% success rate guarantee. They claim to serve all 50 states despite being locally based in South Florida. The company emphasizes personalized evaluation and direct engagement with both credit bureaus and creditors, positioning education and empowerment as core values alongside dispute services.

However, the website lacks specific details about pricing, contract terms, timelines, or substantiation of the 99.9% success rate claim. The company provides no information about credentials, certifications, regulatory compliance, or client reviews beyond generic testimonial placeholders. The broad service offerings (business funding, notary services) suggest a diversified operation, but core credit repair methodology details are limited. Prospective clients should request detailed pricing, understand what the success rate guarantee actually covers, and verify their specific state regulations regarding credit repair services.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers bilingual services with Spanish-language support
Claims 20+ years of experience in credit repair
Four-step documented process: identify errors, gather evidence, prepare disputes, engage creditors
States transparent pricing policy with no hidden fees
Provides additional services including financial coaching and credit counseling
Offers free consultation to evaluate credit reports
Claims to serve all 50 states in addition to local South Florida presence
cons: 99.9% success rate guarantee is unsubstantiated and unusually high for the credit repair industry
Website lacks specific pricing information, contract terms, or service timelines
No verifiable credentials, certifications, or regulatory compliance information displayed
Testimonials section appears incomplete with no actual client reviews or results shown
Broad service offerings (business funding, notary services) dilute focus from core credit repair expertise
best_for: South Florida residents with credit report errors who prefer local, in-person consultation
Spanish-speaking consumers seeking credit repair services with bilingual support
Individuals who want credit counseling and financial coaching alongside dispute services
Consumers willing to work with a company claiming nationwide service despite local headquarters
diagnosis: Credit At Last is best suited for South Florida residents or Spanish-speaking consumers seeking comprehensive credit repair with added financial coaching services. The main caveat is that the unsubstantiated 99.9% success rate claim and lack of transparent pricing details make it essential to request written quotes, understand what results are guaranteed, and verify their regulatory standing before engaging their services.
services: Credit repair with error dispute and creditor negotiation
Credit counseling for debt and credit guidance
Financial coaching for long-term money management
DIY credit repair resources and guidance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 633 NE 167th St Suite 817, North Miami Beach, FL 33162
